case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR VS. VANCE KEITH BARNES II

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT BARNES II, VANCE KEITH
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $45.95) SERVED APR-27-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BARNES II, VANCE KEITH
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-19-2012 - JUDGMENT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,863.00 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT BARNES II, VANCE KEITH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-19-2012 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BARNES II, VANCE KEITH $1,863.00 PRINCIPAL, $45.95 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,908.95, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
